Capacity in figures

What we manufacture

Made to specification.
No fixed catalogue.

Built from tech packs. Delivered to specification.

We do not carry ready-made products. Each programme is developed from the client's tech pack — yarn, gauge, construction and finishing requirements confirmed at prototype stage.

Flat-knit garments on Stoll and Shima Seiki equipment, gauges 3 through 12, for men's, women's and children's categories.

◈

Men's Knitwear

  • Pullovers
  • Cardigans
  • Quarter-zips
  • Crew-necks
◈

Women's Knitwear

  • Cardigans
  • Pullovers
  • Vests
  • Twin sets
◈

Children's Knitwear

  • Pullovers
  • Cardigans
  • Sets
  • Gilets
◈

Custom Programmes

  • Tech pack development
  • Full size runs
  • Fabric lab dips
  • OEM & CMT
Contract manufacturing only · No retail catalogue · Production from client tech packs
Sample production

Built from tech packs.
Delivered to specification.

Each programme is developed from the partner's tech pack. Yarn, gauge, construction and finishing are confirmed at prototype stage before bulk approval.

Selected pieces — AW 2025 · SS 2026 · Contract production
Quarter-Zip Sweater Merino blend · 7GG Men's · AW production
Open Cardigan Cotton · 12GG Women's · SS production
Children's Cardigan Lambswool · 5GG Children's · AW production
Six departments · One facility

From yarn intake
to finished garment.

Vertical integration lets us control quality, timing and consistency across the full production cycle — every operation within one 5,000 m² facility in Bashtil, Giza.

Request a capability overview →
01
KnittingCore production
Whole-garment, panel and integral construction. 88 Stoll and Shima Seiki machines across gauges 3, 5, 7 and 12.
02
Linking & AssemblyIn-house finishing
Hand-linking, overlock and full garment assembly in-house. 120 linkers maintaining seam quality and consistent lead times.
03
Pattern & ProgrammingTechnical development
CAD design, M1plus and SDS-ONE programming, sample development from client tech packs. Seven-day prototype turnaround.
04
Washing & FinishingPost-production
Garment wash, softening, pressing and steam finishing under controlled humidity and temperature.
05
Quality ControlQC & compliance
AQL 2.5 inline inspection throughout production plus pre-shipment audits. Audited annually by SGS under ISO 9001:2015.
06
Export & LogisticsInternational trade
FOB Alexandria, EXW and DDP terms available. L/C and T/T 30% deposit. QIZ accreditation for duty-free US market access.

Inside the facility

Precision is built into every garment when the machines, the operators and the quality system all speak the same language. We have built that language over thirty-seven years.

— Dr. Mahmoud Kamal, Chairman & CEO
Location El-Mohandes M. Debes, Bashtil, Giza
Floor area 5,000 m² · Single site
Machine fleet 88 flat-knit · Gauges 3–12
Peak capacity 2,500 pcs / day · Three shifts
Technical capability

Stitches & yarns
in regular production.

Standard production range. Bespoke yarn sourcing and stitch development available on request for new programmes.

Stitch constructions

Six in production
01JerseyPlain knit, single bed, all gauges.
02Rib1×1, 2×2, broken rib, English rib.
03Cable2×2, 4×4, Aran, plaited cable.
04JacquardTwo-colour, three-colour, intarsia ground.
05PointelleHalf cardigan, mock pointelle, lace ground.
06Fully-fashionedShaped panels, integral neck, set-in sleeve.

Yarn fibres

Six in production
01Merino woolExtra-fine 19.5 μ, 16.5 μ on request.
02CottonCombed, mercerised, organic GOTS.
03Cashmere2/26 Nm, 2/28 Nm, Mongolian sourced.
04LambswoolBritish and New Zealand origin.
05AlpacaBaby alpaca blends, 70/30 and 50/50.
06Technical yarnsTencel, viscose, polyamide blends.
Selected partners

Trusted by
international houses.

A partial list, shared with partner permission. Most programmes run under NDA. Markets served: USA · EU · Turkey · Greece · Egypt.

A note from the Chairman

Forty years of flat-knit,
one roof, one standard.

We are a vertically integrated contract knitwear manufacturer, producing for European, Levantine and American brands from Egypt's QIZ industrial zone.

From yarn intake to finished garment, every operation happens under one roof in Bashtil. Eighty-eight Stoll and Shima Seiki machines, gauges three through twelve, operated by teams with careers built on a single production line. Precision is built into every garment — it cannot be added later.

Dr. Mahmoud Kamal Chairman & CEO · El-Nile Tricot Co.
